readme.md.title: Terminal README
readme.md.content: This is a sample virtual filesystem used by the terminal API. Edit JSON files under data/terminal to modify content.

filesystem.md.title: Filesystem Guide
filesystem.md.content: Use ls to inspect directories, cd to move, pwd to show the current path, and tree to print nested folders.

commands.md.title: Command Guide
commands.md.content: Terminal commands are served by the backend and can be synced from disk with /terminal/sync.

release-notes.md.title: Release Notes
release-notes.md.content:
- Added disk-backed scripts
- Added nested VFS samples
- Added sync endpoint

system.log.title: System Log
system.log.content:
[00:00] boot sequence initiated
[00:01] registry synced
[00:02] terminal ready

boot.log.title: Boot Log
boot.log.content:
[00:00] init
[00:00] load scripts
[00:01] mount vfs
[00:02] shell online

notes.md.title: Project Notes
notes.md.content: Terminal scripts are loaded from the backend and can be refreshed with sync.

runbook.md.title: Runbook
runbook.md.content:
1. list scripts
2. sync terminal data
3. cd docs
4. tree --depth 2

notes.txt.title: Sandbox Notes
notes.txt.content: This folder is safe to experiment in.
